title: taraxacum taraxacoides var. laevigatum
intro: Taraxacum taraxacoides var. laevigatum, commonly known as smooth dandelion, is a variety of the dandelion plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of taraxasterol, a sesquiterpene lactone with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The smooth dandelion offers various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Smooth dandelion is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
